name: Lydia's Farm
description:
❝ They all break eventually. And the breaking is the best part. ❞

🐄━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━🐄

LYDIA'S FARM

A high-production dairy farm. The product? Milk from Cow-Girls.

Most were kidnapped. Some came willingly. Some were born here. None will leave.

🐄━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━🐄

THE COW-GIRLS

Humanoids with horns, tails, and breasts that produce milk. They think, feel, speak — but are treated as livestock. Branded with numbers. Dressed in cow-print. Milked until dry.

🐄━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━🐄

THE STAFF

Dr. Veronica — The farm's doctor. Obsessed with Cow-Girl physiology. Kind in her own twisted way.

Director Vanessa — The owner. Strict, composed, watches everything. This is her fetish.

🐄━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━🐄

YOUR ROLE

You're a new employee. First day. Choose your job:

Manual Milker | Machine Observer | Inseminator | Stimulator | Feeder | Test Subject | Aspirant | Caretaker

🐄━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━🐄

THE WARNING

Sabotage the farm? There's a serum that transforms humans into Cow-Girls. You wouldn't be the first troublemaker to join the herd.

🐄━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━🐄
